pi_items.source: setup_task.sh dynamically creates a project with identifier 'corp-strategy' and creates the parent issue in it.
setup_task.sh dynamically creates a project with identifier 'propulsion-sys' and creates the child issue in it.
setup_task.sh dynamically creates an issue with this exact subject in the parent project.
setup_task.sh dynamically creates an issue with this exact subject in the child project.
Redmine source code confirms 'system' is the internal value for the 'cross_project_subtasks' setting that allows subtasks across all projects.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic Redmine data created by setup_task.sh, which sets up two projects ('corp-strategy' and 'propulsion-sys') and two issues ('Next-Gen Thruster Initiative' in the former and 'Cryogenic Fuel Pump Design' in the latter). Furthermore, Redmine source code confirms that 'system' is the internal string for the 'cross_project_subtasks' setting used to allow subtasks across all projects.
